name: marketing_skills_for_ai_agents
description: A collection of marketing-related skills tailored for Claude Code and AI agents, encompassing conversion rate optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering techniques.

inputs.name: marketing_goal
inputs.description: The specific marketing objective or challenge to address, such as increasing conversions or improving SEO.

inputs.name: content_data
inputs.description: Raw or processed text/content to be optimized or generated for marketing purposes.

inputs.name: analytics_data
inputs.description: Structured data or metrics related to user behavior, traffic, or campaign performance used for analysis.

inputs.name: keywords
inputs.description: Target keywords or phrases for SEO optimization.

outputs.name: optimized_content
outputs.description: Generated or enhanced marketing copy based on input content and SEO best practices.

outputs.name: seo_recommendations
outputs.description: Suggestions and strategies to improve search engine ranking and visibility.

outputs.name: analytics_report
outputs.description: Insights and actionable findings derived from analytics data.

outputs.name: growth_strategies
outputs.description: Recommended tactics and engineering approaches to drive user growth and conversion.

patterns: SEO content optimization and keyword integration
Growth engineering methodologies combining marketing and technical automation
steps: Receive marketing goal and relevant input data such as content, keywords, or analytics.
Analyze inputs for contextual understanding and optimization opportunities.
Apply copywriting and SEO techniques to generate or improve marketing content.
Conduct analytics assessment to identify performance strengths and weaknesses.
Formulate CRO and growth engineering strategies based on combined analysis.
Output optimized content, SEO recommendations, analytics insights, and growth tactics.
use_cases: Enhancing marketing copy for higher conversion rates in digital campaigns.
Optimizing website content for improved search engine ranking and visibility.
Generating analytics-driven reports to inform marketing decision-making.
Designing and implementing growth engineering strategies to scale online presence.
Supporting AI agents that automate marketing workflows with intelligent skill sets.

prompt_templates.name: seo_optimization
prompt_templates.template: Optimize the following content for SEO using these keywords: {keywords}. Content: {content_data}

prompt_templates.name: copywriting_improvement
prompt_templates.template: Improve this marketing copy to increase engagement and conversions: {content_data}

prompt_templates.name: analytics_insights
prompt_templates.template: Analyze this analytics data and provide actionable insights to enhance marketing performance: {analytics_data}

prompt_templates.name: growth_strategy_suggestion
prompt_templates.template: Based on the following marketing goal and analytics data, suggest growth engineering strategies: Goal: {marketing_goal}, Analytics: {analytics_data}
